input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  windows-build:
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install JDK 8
        run: |
          choco install jdk8 -params 'installdir=c:\\java8'
          echo "JAVA_HOME=c:\\java8" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "c:\\java8\\bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
      - name: Install Maven
        run: |
          choco install maven --version 3.6.3
          echo "C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\lib\\maven\\apache-maven-3.6.3\\bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
      - name: Build
        run: |
          set -e
          powershell -C './gradlew.bat build -x test --stacktrace --console=plain --no-daemon'

  linux-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Check Java version
        run: java -version
      - name: Build and test
        run: |
          set -e
          ./gradlew clean build codeCoverageReport --stacktrace --scan --console=plain --no-daemon
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
output:
language: shell

services:
  - docker

os: linux

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: "build"
      name: "Windows Build"
      os: windows
      language: shell
      install:
        - choco install jdk8 -params 'installdir=c:\\java8'
        - export JAVA_HOME="c:\\java8"\\
        - export PATH="$PATH;$JAVA_HOME\\bin"
        - choco install maven -version 3.6.3
        - export PATH="$PATH;C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\lib\\maven\\apache-maven-3.6.3\\bin"
      script:
        - set -e
        - powershell -C './gradlew.bat build -x test --stacktrace --console=plain --no-daemon'
    - name:  "Linux Build"
      os: linux
      language: java
      jdk: openjdk8
      install:
        - java -version
      script:
        - set -e
        - ./gradlew clean build codeCoverageReport --stacktrace --scan --console=plain --no-daemon
      after_success:
        - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

cache:
  directories:
  - $HOME/.m2

after_success:
  - |
    set -e
    if [ "$TRAVIS_OS_NAME" = "linux" ]
    then
      bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
    fi

input:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  without-authentication:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Build without authentication
        run: mvn clean verify -P without-authentication

  one-way-authentication:
    needs: without-authentication
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Build with one way authentication
        run: mvn clean verify -P with-one-way-authentication

  two-way-authentication-by-trusting-each-other:
    needs: one-way-authentication
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Build with two way authentication by trusting each other
        run: mvn clean verify -P with-two-way-authentication-by-trusting-each-other

  two-way-authentication-by-trusting-root-ca:
    needs: two-way-authentication-by-trusting-each-other
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Build with two way authentication by trusting root ca
        run: mvn clean verify -P with-two-way-authentication-by-trusting-root-ca
output:
language: java
os: linux
sudo: true
install: true
jdk: openjdk11

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2

branches:
  only:
    - master

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: "without authentication"
    - script: "mvn clean verify -P without-authentication"
    - stage: "one way authentication"
    - script: "mvn clean verify -P with-one-way-authentication"
    - stage: "two way authentication by trusting each other"
    - script: "mvn clean verify -P with-two-way-authentication-by-trusting-each-other"
    - stage: "two way authentication by trusting root ca"
    - script: "mvn clean verify -P with-two-way-authentication-by-trusting-root-ca"

name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'

        uses: actions/cache@v4

          path: |

            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  docker-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t hl7_validator .

  include:

      script:
        - ./gradlew build

      before_cache:
        - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

      cache:
        directories:
          - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
          - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

    - name: "Docker Build"
      services:
        - docker
      script:
        - docker build -t hl7_validator .

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '11', '12']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew build --scan -s
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
output:
language: java
install: true

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8
  - oraclejdk11
  - oraclejdk12

script:
  - ./gradlew build --scan -s

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

input:
name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches-ignore: [ 'r[0-9]*' ]
  pull_request:
    branches-ignore: [ 'r[0-9]*' ]

jobs:
  build:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            java: '11'
          - os: macos-latest
            java: '11'
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            java: 'ea'
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    continue-on-error: ${{ matrix.java == 'ea' }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}
    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/modules-2
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/dists
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ matrix.java }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ matrix.java }}-
    - name: Install
      run: ./gradlew --version
    - name: Build
      run: ./gradlew --scan --warning-mode=all -Dplatform.tooling.support.tests.enabled=true build
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/*.lock

  coverage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/modules-2
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/dists
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-11-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-11-
    - name: Build with coverage
      run: ./gradlew --scan --stacktrace --warning-mode=all -PenableJaCoCo build jacocoRootReport
    - name: Upload coverage
      run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/*.lock

  deploy:
    if: github.repository == 'junit-team/junit5' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Publish snapshot artifacts
      run: ./gradlew --scan publish -x check

  update_snapshot_documentation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Install graphviz
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y graphviz
    - name: Update snapshot documentation
      run: ./src/publishDocumentationSnapshotOnlyIfNecessary.sh
output:
language: java

branches:
  except:
    - /^r\d.*$/

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/*.lock

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/dists

install:
  - ./gradlew --version # Display Gradle, Groovy, JVM and other versions

jdk:
  - openjdk11
  - openjdk-ea

os:
  - linux
  - osx

matrix:
  exclude:
    - os: osx
      jdk: openjdk-ea

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TERM: dumb

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

install: true

  coverity_scan:
    project:
      name: "micheljung/nocatch"

    build_command_prepend: "./gradlew clean"
    build_command:   "./gradlew build"
    branch_pattern: coverity_scan

deploy:
  on: release

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        db_profile: [derby, mysql, postgresql]
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Build
      run: mvn verify -P${{ matrix.db_profile }}

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push' && github.repository == 'nhl/dflib'
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Deploy
      run: mvn clean source:jar javadoc:javadoc deploy -DskipTests --settings travis_settings.xml

branches:
  only:

jdk:
  - openjdk8

script:
  - mvn verify -P$DB_PROFILE

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: deploy
      jdk: openjdk8
      script: mvn clean source:jar javadoc:javadoc deploy -DskipTests --settings travis_settings.xml
      if: branch IN (master) AND type IN (push) AND repo = nhl/dflib

env:
  global:
    - secure: ""
    - secure: ""
  jobs:
    - DB_PROFILE=derby
    - DB_PROFILE=mysql
    - DB_PROFILE=postgresql

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '11']
        profiles: ['headless-mode', 'headless-mode,chrome']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2/repository
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Install Firefox GeckoDriver
        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get -y install firefox-geckodriver
      - name: Clone and install PrimeFaces
        run: |
          git clone https://github.com/primefaces/primefaces
          cd primefaces
          mvn install
          cd ..
      - name: Clone and install PrimeFaces Selenium
        run: |
          git clone https://github.com/primefaces-extensions/primefaces-selenium
          cd primefaces-selenium
          mvn install
          cd ..
      - name: Setup GeckoDriver symlink
        run: ln -s /usr/bin/geckodriver geckodriver
      - name: Install ChromeDriver
        run: source .travis/install-chromedriver.sh
      - name: Build and install
        run: mvn -B -V clean install -P${{ matrix.profiles }}
output:
language: java
dist: xenial
sudo: false

jdk:
  - openjdk8
  - openjdk11

env:
  - PROFILES=headless-mode
  - PROFILES=headless-mode,chrome

before_install:
  - sudo apt-get -y install firefox-geckodriver
install:
  - git clone https://github.com/primefaces/primefaces && cd primefaces && mvn install && cd ..
  - git clone https://github.com/primefaces-extensions/primefaces-selenium && cd primefaces-selenium && mvn install && cd ..
script:
  - ln -s /usr/bin/geckodriver geckodriver
  - source .travis/install-chromedriver.sh
  - mvn -B -V clean install -P${PROFILES}

addons:
  apt:
    update: true
cache:
  directories:
    - "$HOME/.m2/repository"

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: chmod +x gradlew
      - name: Setup CI workspace
        run: ./gradlew setupCIWorkspace -S
      - name: Build
        run: ./gradlew build
      - name: Generate Javadoc
        run: ./gradlew javadoc
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/minecraft/deobfedDeps/providedDummy.jar
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/minecraft/deobfedDeps/compileDummy.jar
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/1.12.x'
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v4
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          publish_dir: ./build/docs/javadoc
          keep_files: true

dist: trusty

language: java
jdk: oraclejdk8

  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/minecraft/deobfedDeps/providedDummy.jar
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/minecraft/deobfedDeps/compileDummy.jar

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

before_install: chmod +x gradlew
install:
  - ./gradlew setupCIWorkspace -S
script:
  - ./gradlew build
after_success:
  - ./gradlew javadoc

notifications:
email: false

deploy:
  - provider: pages
    skip-cleanup: true
    github-token: $GITHUB_TOKEN
    keep-history: true
    local-dir: ./build/docs/javadoc
    on:
      branch: 1.12.x
